title: trichocentrum × teaboanum
intro: Trichocentrum × teaboanum, also known as the 'Tiger Orchid', is a hybrid plant species obtained by crossing Trichocentrum spp. with Teaboanum spp. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to lower blood pressure and alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Trichocentrum × teaboanum include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which help protect against cell damage and promote overall well-being. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve making teas or infusions from its flowers, leaves, or roots, which are believed to provide relief from various health conditions.
